content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Monthly Report (April 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the `plugin-telegram` repository during April 2026 was focused on refining the user interface and improving the presentation of chat data. The primary effort centered on enhancing the visual consistency of the Telegram integration by optimizing how display names are rendered. This month’s work reflects a commitment to polishing the user experience within the ElizaOS framework.

## 🛠️ Key Developments
The development efforts for April were concentrated on UI/UX refinements to ensure a cleaner interface for users interacting with the Telegram plugin.

### UI/UX Enhancements
*   **Chat Display Optimization:** Work was initiated to improve the readability and layout of the Telegram interface. Specifically, pull request [#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/26) was opened to narrow Telegram chat display names, aiming to provide a more streamlined and aesthetically consistent chat view.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
*   **Closed Issues:** There were no issues closed during the month of April 2026.
*   **New & Active Issues:** No new issues were opened, and there were no active issues reported throughout the month. The project maintained a stable state with no outstanding bug reports or feature requests requiring triage during this period.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
The activity in April was characterized by targeted maintenance and UI refinement. As there were no new issues opened or complex discussions recorded, the focus remained on individual contributions toward improving the plugin's interface. The submission of PR [#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/26) serves as the primary indicator of ongoing development progress for the month.
